历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 16648 → 18768 → 17605 → 44249 → 26844, with significant fluctuations; in 2024, due to adjustments in subject selection requirements, an abnormal ranking of 44249 occurred, and in 2025 it rebounded to about 26844; the recent 2-year baseline is approximately 26844; the Physics Category enrollment plan was 194 in 2021 → 199 in 2022 → 205 in 2023 → 194 in 2024 → 216 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 234, an increase of 18 students (+8.3%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has been steadily rising: 2021: 53 → 2022: 51 → 2023: 46 → 2024: 50 → 2025: 50 → 2026: 44, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the overall strength and recognition of the school; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (mainly involving school management and campus safety public opinion); Douyin popularity ranks 8th overall (high heat), with high short video exposure, attracting considerable application attention; in 2022 and 2025, there were abnormal signals in admission cutoffs (Anhui dropped to the first-tier line, Guangxi plummeted nearly 40,000 places, Heilongjiang admitted at 389 points), historical cutoff anomalies may have a lagging effect on application psychology; however, it has Double First-Class disciplines such as Chemistry, Materials Science and Engineering, and Clinical Medicine, with balanced overall disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social heat, highly overlapping with Zhengzhou University's Physics Category enrollment majors, potentially attracting more applicants; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province is approximately 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% compared to 320,192 in 2025, intensifying competition; the provincial control line in 2025 was 405 points, down from 422 points in 2024, indicating changes in exam difficulty or scoring standards; Zhengzhou University is located in Zhengzhou, Henan, relatively close to Hunan, with high regional acceptance for cross-province applications; the university has a large enrollment scale in Hunan Province (200+ in Physics Category), making it an important source of students outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 26844, an enrollment expansion of about 8.3% in 2026, an increase of about 8.4% in Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province, and factors such as a somewhat negative school reputation but high Douyin heat, competition is expected to intensify slightly in 2026; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 28386, with a range of 27886–28886.
